Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller
Convenience marshallers pairing RDF serializers and parsers into single classes with fluent to/from methods.

Each class combines a matching serializer and parser for a specific RDF syntax — including RDF/XML, Turtle, N3, N-Triples, N-Quads, TriG, TriX, and JSON-LD — so RDF content can be read and written through a single object.

  • Related Packages

    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    RDF Marshalling Support
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    JsonLd
    A pairing of a JsonLdSerializer and JsonLdParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    N3
    A pairing of a N3Serializer and N3Parser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    NQuads
    A pairing of a NQuadsSerializer and NQuadsParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    NTriple
    A pairing of a NTripleSerializer and NTripleParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    RdfJson
    A pairing of a RdfJsonSerializer and RdfJsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    RdfProto
    A pairing of RdfProtoSerializer and RdfProtoParser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    RdfThrift
    A pairing of RdfThriftSerializer and RdfThriftParser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    RdfXml
    A pairing of a RdfXmlSerializer and RdfXmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    RdfXmlAbbrev
    A pairing of a RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer and RdfXmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    TriG
    A pairing of a TriGSerializer and TriGParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    TriX
    A pairing of a TriXSerializer and TriXParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
    Turtle
    A pairing of a TurtleSerializer and TurtleParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
